title: Hero content is populated after page load
description: Verifies the Hero section renders with non-empty subtitle and description populated from dynamic content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Wait for the page content to finish loading
Verify the Hero section shows a populated subtitle
Verify the Hero section shows a populated description

title: Capabilities and Projects populate from dynamic content
description: Verifies the Capabilities cards and Projects slider render with items populated from dynamic content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the CAPABILITIES section
Scroll to the PROJECTS section
Verify capability cards are displayed
Verify project cards are displayed in the projects slider

title: Active sidebar section updates while scrolling
description: Verifies the active sidebar item updates to match the section currently in view as the user scrolls down the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll down until the ABOUT section is the primary visible section
Scroll down until the PROJECTS section is the primary visible section
Verify the sidebar indicates PROJECTS as the active section

title: About section content is populated after page load
description: Verifies the About section renders with non-empty stats, bio, and a quote populated from dynamic content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the ABOUT section
Wait for the ABOUT section content to finish loading
Verify the ABOUT section shows at least one stat item and a populated bio

title: Jump to CONTACT via sidebar and highlight active section
description: Verifies the user can use the sidebar to smooth-scroll to the CONTACT section and the CONTACT nav item becomes active.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Click the CONTACT item in the sidebar navigation
Verify the contact form is visible
Verify the sidebar indicates CONTACT as the active section

title: Advance to next project card using slider arrow
description: This test verifies that a visitor can move to the next project card from the Projects section using the right arrow and the slider updates the active project.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the PROJECTS section
Click the slider right arrow control
Verify the next project card becomes active in the slider

title: Submit the contact form successfully with all required fields
description: Verifies a visitor can complete the contact form with valid required inputs and sees a success confirmation after submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the CONTACT section
Fill "Test Visitor" into the name field
Fill "test.visitor@example.com" into the email field
Fill "Hello Kevin, I would like to discuss a role opportunity." into the message field
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Open gallery modal from a project thumbnail
description: This test verifies that activating a project thumbnail opens the gallery modal and displays a gallery item with caption and counter.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the PROJECTS section
Click a project thumbnail to open the gallery
Verify the gallery modal is open and a gallery item with caption and counter is displayed

title: Send a valid question and receive a rendered chatbot reply
description: Verifies a visitor can submit a non-empty question in Ask Kevin and a reply message is rendered in the conversation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Click the Ask Kevin floating control
Fill "What projects best demonstrate product management impact?" into the chat message field
Submit the chat message
Verify a new assistant reply is displayed in the chat conversation

title: Open portfolio PDF preview from Hero section
description: This test verifies that a visitor can open the portfolio PDF preview from the Hero area and the PDF is displayed in an iframe modal.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Click the control to preview the portfolio from the HERO section
Verify a PDF preview modal opens and a PDF is displayed in an iframe

title: Open Ask Kevin chat window from the portfolio page
description: Verifies a visitor can open the Ask Kevin chatbot from the landing page and the chat window becomes visible and ready for input.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Click the Ask Kevin floating control
Verify the chat window is displayed

title: Navigate to next gallery item
description: This test verifies that a visitor can move to the next gallery item in the modal and the displayed item and counter update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the PROJECTS section
Click a project thumbnail to open the gallery
Click the gallery next control
Verify the gallery displays a different item than before and the counter updates

title: Return to previous project card using slider arrow
description: This test verifies that a visitor can return to the previous project card using the left arrow and the slider updates the active project.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the PROJECTS section
Click the slider right arrow control
Click the slider left arrow control
Verify the slider returns to the previously active project card

title: Select Business PM resume and open its PDF preview
description: This test verifies that choosing the Business PM resume option from the resume picker opens a PDF preview modal showing the selected resume.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Click the control to open the resume picker from the HERO section
Select the Business PM resume option
Verify a PDF preview modal opens and displays the selected resume in an iframe

title: Navigate to previous gallery item
description: This test verifies that a visitor can move to the previous gallery item in the modal and the displayed item and counter update accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the PROJECTS section
Click a project thumbnail to open the gallery
Click the gallery next control
Click the gallery previous control
Verify the gallery returns to the earlier item and the counter updates

title: Navigate projects by dragging the slider
description: This test verifies that a visitor can drag the projects slider to move to an adjacent project card and the active project updates.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the PROJECTS section
Press ArrowRight
Press ArrowLeft
Verify the active project card changes after keyboard navigation

title: Show required-field validation when contact form is incomplete
description: Verifies the contact form prevents submission when a required field is blank and displays a validation warning.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the CONTACT section
Fill "Test Visitor" into the name field
Fill "" into the email field
Fill "Checking required-field validation." into the message field
Submit the contact form
Verify a required-fields validation warning is visible

title: Reveal animations trigger in Experience section while scrolling
description: Verifies that scrolling through the Experience section triggers reveal-on-scroll so newly entered items become visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll down to the Experience section
Scroll within the Experience section to bring additional timeline items into the viewport
Verify newly entered Experience items become visible as the user scrolls

title: Log in to admin and access editable content dashboard
description: Verifies an admin can sign in on /admin using valid credentials and reaches the content management dashboard with editable fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the admin login form
Verify the admin dashboard with editable content fields is displayed

title: Jump to a project using dot indicators
description: This test verifies that selecting a dot indicator jumps the slider to the corresponding project card.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the PROJECTS section
Click a non-active dot indicator for the projects slider
Verify the project card corresponding to the selected dot becomes active

title: Close gallery modal by clicking outside overlay and return to browsing
description: This test verifies that clicking outside the gallery viewer closes the modal and the visitor can continue browsing projects.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the PROJECTS section
Click a project thumbnail to open the gallery
Click outside the viewer overlay
Verify the gallery modal is closed and the projects section is visible for continued browsing

title: Capabilities cards animate into view on scroll
description: Verifies capability cards reveal when the CAPABILITIES section enters view and appear as visible content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the CAPABILITIES section
Wait for the cards to finish their reveal animation
Verify capability cards are visible and readable

title: Download from PDF preview modal
description: This test verifies that triggering download from the PDF preview initiates a download attempt for the currently displayed PDF.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Click the control to preview the portfolio from the HERO section
Trigger download in the PDF preview modal
Verify the browser begins a file download for the displayed PDF

title: Capability card hover reveals background and inverts text
description: Verifies hovering a capability card reveals its background image and changes text color to the inverted hover state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the CAPABILITIES section
Move the pointer over a capability card
Verify the hovered capability card shows a revealed background image and inverted text styling

title: Block empty chatbot submissions with client-side validation
description: Verifies submitting an empty Ask Kevin message is prevented and a validation warning is shown to the visitor.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Click the Ask Kevin floating control
Fill "" into the chat message field
Submit the chat message
Verify a message validation warning is visible

title: Reveal animations trigger for Skills content when scrolled into view
description: Verifies that Skills elements configured for reveal become visible as the user scrolls them into the viewport.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll down to the Skills section
Scroll within the Skills section to bring additional skill elements into the viewport
Verify Skills elements become visible as they enter the viewport

title: Reveal behavior remains consistent after scrolling past and returning to a section
description: Verifies that reveal-visible elements remain visible and do not regress when the user scrolls away and back to a revealed section.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll down to the Experience section
Scroll within the Experience section until multiple items have entered the viewport
Scroll down further to a later section
Scroll back up to the Experience section
Verify previously revealed Experience items are still visible when returning to the section

title: Capability card tilts with pointer movement
description: Verifies moving the pointer across a capability card produces a visible tilt/parallax effect.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the CAPABILITIES section
Move the pointer across a capability card from one side to the other
Verify the capability card tilts in response to pointer movement

title: Prevent navigation before the first project card
description: This test verifies that attempting to move left from the first project does not navigate past the start and the first card remains active.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll to the PROJECTS section
Click the slider left arrow control
Verify the slider remains on the first project card and does not move past the start

title: Reject invalid admin credentials with an authentication error
description: Verifies the admin login form shows an authentication error when incorrect credentials are submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Fill "invalid@example.com" into the email field
Fill "wrong-password" into the password field
Submit the admin login form
Verify an authentication error message is visible

title: Reveal timing works when scrolling quickly through multiple sections
description: Verifies that fast scrolling still reveals content in each section as it enters the viewport.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for body attribute data-content-loaded to equal true before proceeding
Scroll quickly from the top down past Experience and into Metrics
Scroll slightly to stabilize the viewport on Metrics content
Verify content in the currently viewed section is visible after fast scrolling
